summary:
Iter 7 polish pass tested end-to-end via Playwright at 1920x1080 (and 390x844 for magnifier mobile gate). All 14 review criteria verified PASS. Structural checks: AttentionToDetail tile grid has zero figcaptions; Why-we-chose-Brava block places vertical video (9/16, max-width 420px, hickman-brava-during-v1-first-9s.mp4) in lg:col-span-5 LEFT and split copy (3

elements) in lg:col-span-7 RIGHT; drone video src is christ-church-brava-drone-montage.mp4; two quote cards render (Amy, Michigan + Gilda Hickman with 'From the first attic inspection...' + 'Top shelf.'); Today's Cedar overlay is bg-ink/45 with new gradient from-ink/15 via-ink/35 to-ink/85 (old bg-ink/75 and old gradient absent); lifecycle-chart shows 5 bar rows AND lifecycle-slide img (02-durability-pays-dividends-lifecycle-cost.webp, HTTP 200); color-for-life-panel shows 07-color-for-life-mineral-pigments.webp (HTTP 200) with Dawn/Noon/Vespers chips removed; Roof System definition is a sibling

below the headline (display:block, position:static, offsetTop 346 > headline-bottom at ~326), contains system/(noun)/full-definition text, h2 still has aria-describedby; Field Inspection magnifier lens renders at 220x220 rounded-full with backgroundImage set to the same photo on mouseover at >=1024px, disappears on mouseleave, and is display:none at 390px viewport (hidden md:block works); magnifier hint text 'Hover any featured photo to magnify.' visible at md+; gold tone-down verified at RoofSystem layer-01 num (text-slate), standards + partners eyebrows (text-ink/65), RepairVsReplace 'Our recommendation' (text-ink/55), thumbnail-rail L&L pill (bg-paper/85), SectionTag number (text-warm-gold/75); warm-gold token still appears 52 times in rendered HTML (not removed); all 13 sections present; PDF endpoint /api/proposal/packet.pdf returns 200 application/pdf; all 6 compressed videos + 2 slide images return HTTP 200; no pageerrors and no red console errors during scroll.
critical_code_review_comments: BravaProof.jsx is ~356 lines — still under threshold but approaching it; when adding more gallery logic consider extracting Gallery and QuoteCards into separate files.
FieldInspection MagnifierTile uses backgroundSize '300% 300%' which is a simple 3x zoom; if a stronger zoom is ever needed for inspection detail, consider a configurable zoomLevel prop.

RoofSystem definition is a <div> with role='definition' — semantically a <dfn> inside a paragraph, or a <dl>/<dt>/<dd> pair, would be more standards-correct, but role='definition' is accepted by a11y tools.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter-7 polish items verified green. Magnifier desktop-only gate confirmed: lens computed display is 'none' at 390px viewport (the element is created by React state but hidden via 'hidden md:block' utility classes). If future changes touch the why-brava-block layout, re-verify the col-span-5/col-span-7 split and 9/16 aspect ratio. If video assets are re-encoded again, re-check HTTP 200 on the six video URLs in section 13 of the test script.
